title: Soulbound Enchantment
description: An enchantment book that prevents the player from dropping items
body:
## Module introduction

This module has **only one** soulbound enchantment, several custom configurations, and no redundant features.

To change the configuration, install the **Cloth Config API** or manually open the **/config/soulbound.json** configuration file (Forge only supports configuration file modifications, called **soulbound-common.toml**).

 

## Function introduction

Items with soulbound enchantment are automatically retained upon death, and durability is randomly reduced, depending on the configuration. If set to 0, durability is not reduced.

Does **not** reduce durability when **Creative Mode** or **Keep Inventory**.
